_comment: Tier-2 fixture: hyperelasticity pitfall #11 — 'For FESystem (vector-valued), use fe_values[FEValuesExtractors::Vector(0)].get_function_gradients() — NOT fe_values.get_function_gradients() which is the scalar-FE signature and will not compile.'
